'''鈭歯g-f-l-g''' ('''kangaflegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valorise|valorise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valorise|valorise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-f-l-g
|-
! Lemma
| kangaflegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingaflegoko|thingaflegoko]] || [[word:jingaflegoko|jingaflegoko]] || [[word:shingaflegoko|shingaflegoko]] || [[word:kingaflegoko|kingaflegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngaflegoko|th忙ngaflegoko]] || [[word:j忙ngaflegoko|j忙ngaflegoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngaflegoko|sh忙ngaflegoko]] || [[word:k忙ngaflegoko|k忙ngaflegoko]]
|-

|-
